title: Workspace Guard MVP migration
description: Track MVP work to evolve HomeGuard into Workspace Guard per workspace-guard-spec-v0.2.md, covering shared scan core, CLI, policy, extension diagnostics, and test parity.

title: Add Extension Development Host smoke test
Integrate extension diagnostics
description: Wire the shared scanner into the VS Code extension so workspace open and file save events produce diagnostics and Problems entries in restricted mode without external execution.

title: HomeGuard MVP 実装
description: spec.md の MVP 範囲を CLI ラッパーと VS Code 拡張の両面で実装する。$HOME 直開き検知、Escape Folder 誘導、基本設定、後続の privacy hardening 基盤まで含めて段階的に進める。

title: path 正規化と home 判定 utility を実装
description: realpath, ~ 展開, 環境変数展開, . / .. 解決, 末尾スラッシュ吸収をまとめた共通 utility を作る。HomeOpenDetected 判定と allowList / high-risk folder 判定の土台にする。

title: CLI wrapper の warn redirect block を実装
description: code ~, code $HOME, cd ~ && code ., code /absolute/path/to/home を検知し、policy に応じて warn / redirect / block を行う。本物の code を安全に exec する。

title: VS Code 拡張の起動時と folder 追加検知を実装
description: activate() と onDidChangeWorkspaceFolders で workspaceFolders を検査し、$HOME 混入時に通知する。multi-root workspace の追加 folder 単位でも扱う。

title: Escape Folder の生成と誘導フローを実装
description: Persistent Escape Folder を既定にし、必要なら初期 README.md, .gitignore, .homeguard.json を生成する。CLI と通知 UI の両方から安全な退避先として開けるようにする。

title: 設定モデルと policy モードを実装
description: homeGuard.mode, escapeFolder, allowList, highRiskFolders, startup checks などの基本設定を定義し、Warn / Redirect / Block / Audit-only を切り替えられるようにする。

title: Output Channel とバックアップ rollback 基盤を実装
description: 判定ログの最小記録、verbose mode、settings 変更前バックアップ、rollback の土台を整える。機微情報を避けるログ方針に合わせる。

title: telemetry audit と privacy hardening を実装
description: VS Code 本体と既知拡張の telemetry 設定を監査し、Safe / Actionable / Unknown / Risky に分類する。差分表示、適用、復元まで含めて制御可能な範囲を実装する。

title: 受け入れ条件ベースのテストを整備
description: code ~, code . from home, GUI からの $HOME 検知, redirect, allowList, telemetry audit, backup 作成の受け入れ条件をテストで担保する。CLI と拡張それぞれの主要ケースを自動化する。

title: Workspace Safety acceptance tests を追加
description: save / git / terminal / task / delete / publish の主要受け入れ条件を自動テスト化する。

title: Add Marketplace license file
description: Add a LICENSE file so VSIX packaging stops warning and Marketplace metadata is explicit.

title: Recheck Scorecard maintained signal after repository ages past 90 days
description: The remaining MaintainedID alert is age-based and should become actionable only after the repository is older than 90 days. Re-run Scorecard after that threshold and confirm the alert clears or investigate any new maintenance signal issues.

title: Add fixtures and consistency tests
description: Add fixtures and tests for safe, suspicious, malicious-like, and broken JSON/JSONC inputs, plus CLI and extension consistency checks across shared rules.

title: Enable branch protection and required reviews for main
description: Apply GitHub rules or branch protection to  so force-push/delete are blocked and pull requests require review plus status checks. This should clear the remaining Scorecard  and  alerts that cannot be fixed from repository files alone.

title: terminal/task safety guard を設計・実装
description: terminal command, task, debug launch の危険コマンド実行前ガードを実装する。完全インターセプトではなく高リスク検知と確認フローを優先する。

title: Workspace Safety Guard 進化
description: HomeGuard を open ガードから workspace-wide safety guard へ拡張する。情報露出だけでなく、破壊的削除・誤コミット・誤公開・誤実行を主対象にし、save / git / terminal / task / delete / publish を安全対象へ広げる。

title: Enroll Workspace Guard in OpenSSF Best Practices
description: Sign the project up for the OpenSSF Best Practices badge and track progress until Scorecard no longer reports CIIBestPracticesID. This requires an external service enrollment rather than a code change in the repository.

title: Build scanner and finding model
description: Create the shared scanning foundation: target file discovery, JSON/JSONC loading, finding model, summary aggregation, and formatter interfaces reused by CLI and extension.

title: Prepare repository for OpenSSF Best Practices
Enable branch protection and required reviews for main
description: Apply GitHub rules or branch protection to main so force-push/delete are blocked and pull requests require review plus status checks. This should clear the remaining Scorecard BranchProtectionID and CodeReviewID alerts that cannot be fixed from repository files alone.

title: Add SARIF output support
description: Implement SARIF output compatible with GitHub Code Scanning by mapping findings, rules, locations, and severities into SARIF 2.1.0.

title: Implement configuration scan rules
description: Implement deterministic rules for tasks.json, launch.json, mcp.json, settings.json, and *.code-workspace, including severity, evidence extraction, and dangerous pattern heuristics.

title: Add policy loading and validation
description: Add policy file loading, validation, and allowlist filtering for findings and commands without weakening deterministic scanning.

title: Recheck Scorecard maintained signal after repository ages past 90 days
description: The remaining  alert is age-based and should become actionable only after the repository is older than 90 days. Re-run Scorecard after that threshold and confirm the alert clears or investigate any new maintenance signal issues.

title: Add extension commands and export flows
description: Add extension commands and UX flows for scanning, showing findings, exporting JSON, copying a Copilot prompt, and opening or toggling policy-related features.

title: Update GitHub Actions for Node 24 runtime
description: Update pinned GitHub Actions to revisions that support the Node 24 runtime before GitHub forces JavaScript actions off Node 20 on June 2, 2026.

title: Workspace Safety policy model を拡張
description: open 以外の action types を含む policy model, risk scoring, command surface, audit log を定義する。

title: Add CLI scan command
description: Add a scan-oriented CLI surface that invokes the shared engine, supports text/json output, profile and fail-on options, and returns the specified exit codes.

title: git/publish safety guard を設計・実装
description: git add/commit/push/publish と extension publish surface に対する高リスク workspace ガードを実装する。

title: Enroll Workspace Guard in OpenSSF Best Practices
description: Sign the project up for the OpenSSF Best Practices badge and track progress until Scorecard no longer reports . This requires an external service enrollment rather than a code change in the repository.

title: Bundle extension for Marketplace
description: Bundle the VS Code extension entrypoint to reduce VSIX JavaScript file count and address vsce performance warnings before broad release.

title: save/delete safety guard を設計・実装
description: format on save, code action on save, explorer delete, refactor delete の危険操作に対して warn / confirm / block を実装する。
